message:
feat(sqlmodel): Add global console support for convenience usage

Implement optional global console pattern using OnceLock for simple setup:

- Add global_console module with thread-safe single initialization
- set_global_console() and set_global_shared_console() for custom consoles
- init_auto_console() for auto-detected mode
- global_console() and has_global_console() for access
- Update SessionBuilder.build_with() to check global console:
  Priority: explicit > global > none
- Export all functions from prelude with console feature
- 4 unit tests for global console API

Closes: bd-bc1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
